title: salix × polychroma
intro: Salix × polychroma, also known as the golden weeping willow, is a hybrid willow plant that results from the cross-breeding of two Salix species, typically Salix alba and Salix matsudana. The bark and leaves of Salix × polychroma have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Salix × polychroma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
